parameters:
Oh, \n[1]. Lately, your sister's been so busy we're short-handed. Could you work to
make up for it?

Taking orders, washing dishes, I was worked to the bone... ...Thinking I'm working so
Elly can have time to get naughty...it stirs up some strange feelings...
// 進行度2以上、昼夜真夜中

\n[1], you... Don't tell me you've only fucked Elly-chan once!? Shit! I lost...
Should've taken this patheticness into account...
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = エリィ酒場
// 朝と夜、酒場モブ消える_最初のイベだけいる
// 進行度2以上、昼夜真夜中

Oh, \n[1]! I was just wanting to ask you something! How's it been with Elly-chan since
then? Did you get to do her again at least once more? ...Just as I thought! Of course
you can't resist Elly-chan, can you!

// 朝と夜、酒場モブ消える_最初のイベだけいる

Ahaha, you old man~...♡ It's not like you'd care about seeing this now, right? You
always look at my asshole when we're doing it anyway~♡

No, no! That ain't true! Even if you're a girl who's always ready to get fucked...! A
girl dressed in sexy clothes is always a good thing!

That's what you call a man's romance! Hahaha...! Man, thanks to Elly-chan, the drinks
are going down easy! In that case, add another beer for me!

Ahaha♡ Thanks, old man♡ As a thank you...♡ Next time we meet in bed, I'll serve you
reeeal good♡
What?! You sly one! Then I'll have two more! Gahaha...!

...Elly is happily chatting with the shop's regulars. It doesn't seem like she'd pay
any attention to me at all...

Ugh, Elly... It looks like you're having a lot of fun with those old men... Doesn't
seem like there's any room for me...
You probably shouldn't go any further...

The proprietress is a really quiet person, huh... Ever since I was a kid, I don't
think I've ever had a conversation with her...

...... \n[1], how long do you plan on staying here? You should get out of this village
already.

Your sister is happy like that. She's that kind of woman, so just leave her be.
...Hmph, fine...... Don't come crying to me when you regret it.

I've been seeing girls getting attacked on the roadside a lot lately... What's that
all about? I could tell from the vibe that it was consensual, but... Being able to do
whatever you want with such cute girls, I'm jealous of you guys.

M-man, that's nice... A bunny girl shop clerk...♡ Wait, is she a prostitute or
something...? She's getting totally groped by all the old men in the village...

Isn't the public morals in this village way too far gone? I keep seeing girls openly
having sex out in the open... And it's always the same girl, but with a different guy
every time...

Whoa... That's a huge ass♡ You don't see a slutty bunny girl like that even in the
Royal City very often...♡ What a waste of a perverted woman in this backwater
town...♡
